bio:
Arna is a white bunny with a pair of very long ears, usually accompanied by three Mini Arnas. She is a very skilled healer, while the Mini Arnas are very skilled fighters.

Arna can also fight, probably fight better than even Mini Arna. But due to her kind behavior, she usually avoids fights and just heals the Mini Arnas throughout a fight to the point of exhaustions. Her ears are a very useful asset in a fight: it can be used to heal, shield, or even damage opponents.`
nameMeaning: A portmanteau of the words 'care' and 'N/A'.
personalityValues: Mini Arnas being safe, others' happiness
personalityQuirks: kept giving to others despite harming herself
bodyShapeDescription: Arna's bunny body is completely covered with brilliant white fur aside from her pinkish ears. Her face is adorned with blood red eyes, coupled with her big bunny teeth. The ears are slightly longer than normal bunnies, so long that it can wrap around her neck like a scarf. At the end of her body, there is a short pink round tail and powerful bunny legs.
abilities: Endless Heal: Arna uses her life force to heal her three Mini Arnas, draining her own life. This is activated as long as her Mini Arnas use moves.
moves: Instant Heal: Arna focuses on one Mini Arna then gave him her focused healing power to heal him completely, tiring Arna more in the process.
Shield: Arna tries to endure damages using her long ears.
Peace Call: When Arna decided that all of them can't survive the battle, she will unleash the remainder of her magical power to calm everyone in the surroundings so they can escape.
